.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(246, 249, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(239, 243, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.background: rgb(239, 243, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgb(239, 243, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(34, 142, 195, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(239, 243, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgba(34, 142, 195, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(246, 249, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #F6F9FB 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#F6F9FB, color-mix(in srgb, #F6F9FB 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #F6F9FB 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#F6F9FB, color-mix(in srgb, #F6F9FB 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(246, 249, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(246, 249, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(0, 200, 200, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(245, 26, 104, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

rgba(156, 122, 211, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(245, 26, 104, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

rgba(4, 119, 255, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(207, 186, 0, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(123, 140, 165, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(52, 145, 94, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

rgba(4, 119, 255, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(253, 148, 52, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(34, 142, 195, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(246, 249, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(34, 142, 195, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(239, 243, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(239, 243, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(34, 142, 195, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(246, 249, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(239, 243, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(36, 155, 211) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(246, 249, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(246, 249, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(227, 237, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(270deg, rgba(253, 220, 10, 0.85) 0%, rgba(241, 235, 30, 0.9) 88%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(227, 237, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(227, 237, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr.background: rgb(227, 237, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(246, 249, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(227, 237, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(239, 243, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
